_comment: Fake/sanitized Vapi End Of Call Report (PSTN). Reserved fictional 555-01xx numbers only; no real PII. Build 244 fixture.

message.transcript: AI: Hello, roofing services. Homeowner: I have a roof leak. AI: Booking an inspection for tomorrow afternoon. Homeowner: Yes please.
message.summary: Homeowner reported a roof leak and accepted an inspection appointment.
